---
title: "PRML VSLAM Publications"
---

This minimal site exposes the two primary rendered Typst outputs in this repository:

- the report built from [`docs/report/main.typ`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/prml-vslam/blob/main/docs/report/main.typ)
- the update deck built from [`docs/slides/update-meetings/update-slides.typ`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/prml-vslam/blob/main/docs/slides/update-meetings/update-slides.typ)

## Published PDFs

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Report

Rendered PDF for the main report entrypoint.

[Open `report.pdf`](./report.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

[View report source](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/prml-vslam/blob/main/docs/report/main.typ)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Update Slides

Rendered PDF for the unified update-meeting deck.

[Open `update-slides.pdf`](./update-slides.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

[View slides source](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/prml-vslam/blob/main/docs/slides/update-meetings/update-slides.typ)
:::
:::

## Build Contract

The GitHub Pages workflow:

1. builds the Typst report
2. builds the update slides
3. renders this Quarto site
4. publishes the site plus both generated PDFs
